title: Quiz (Remotely Proctored)
description:
This quiz consists of 20 questions. The total available time is 40 mins. The quiz will be available in Canvas from 12:30 PM to 2:00 PM.

The objectives of this quiz are to provide you with an opportunity to demonstrate your understanding of the course’s concepts and frameworks as well as to work with them again. Please pick the best answer for each of the following questions. 

Please note that the Proctorio setting is set as strict. What this means is it will flag you if you don't follow the standard protocols set by Proctorio. These protocols include but are not limited to scanning the entire room, switching tabs, looking around the room during the exam, having prohibited electronic devices around, etc. Please be mindful of these and don't give Proctorio any reason to flag your test. With that, Good Luck!

**Important**

If you face any connection issues, please send me an email sina@colorado.edu.

49e090ba137d0677eb4b2f9b8eda7368123156
